name: corcept_doctor
title: Corcept Doctor
description: Run corcept's health-check (ledger presence, permissions, schema sanity). Authority: Observe. Trust ceiling: Reviewed.

path.description: Workspace root to inspect (defaults to current directory).

validate_perms.description: Check owner-only (0700) permissions on ledger and operator data dirs.

strict.description: Fail on any check failure; validate ledger rows against JSON Schema.
